privileged_info_summary: The GPX file 'company_lz.gpx' is dynamically created at /sdcard/company_lz.gpx by setup_task.sh. It contains three waypoints: LZ_ALPHA (37.6150, -122.3900), LZ_BRAVO (37.8000, -122.2500), and LZ_CHARLIE (37.4000, -122.0500). LZ_ALPHA's coordinates approximate Coast Guard Air Station San Francisco (37.6320556, -122.3896944). LZ_CHARLIE's coordinates approximate Moffett Federal Airfield (37.4090, -122.0423). The target waypoint LZ_ALPHA is labeled as 'SFO Coast Guard Station' in the GPX file.
